items.evidence: build.gradle.kts serialSlingerVersion=2.0.14 with blank suffix; package.json and package-lock.json are 2.0.14; npm run jdeploy:release-preflight confirmed Gradle base/display/package 2.0.14 and package serialslinger@2.0.14.
androidApp/build.gradle.kts versionCode bumped from 21 to 22; versionName still follows root serialSlingerDisplayVersion, so Android reports 2.0.14.

Passed npm run jdeploy:release-preflight, just check, ./gradlew check, ./gradlew prepareDesktopJdeployBundle verifyDesktopJdeployBundle, ./gradlew androidApp:compileDebugKotlin, local jDeploy prepare/package/install-local/verify-install/local launch, npm run jdeploy:pack-preview, gitleaks detect . --no-banner, and git diff --check. Signed Android bundle is deferred until the user's follow-up request.

Reviewed release diff: shared Arducon firmware-update/page ordering/readback validation changes apply to both platforms; binary-frame logging was mirrored in Android and desktop; Android-only debug/update entry and temperature calibration UI changes have no desktop equivalent needed.
User confirmed hardware testing already passed before this 2.0.14 jDeploy request.
User confirmed hardware testing already passed before this 2.0.14 jDeploy request; local jDeploy install and launch also passed on this Mac.

items.evidence: Prepared release notes: SerialSlinger 2.0.14 improves Arducon firmware update reliability, uses safer Arducon bootloader entry behavior, caps Days To Run at the supported range, ignores erased/invalid Arducon readbacks, and improves Android temperature calibration entry.

main fast-forwarded to Development_Android release commit 0eac99d before tagging; git status reported main ahead of origin/main with the 2.0.14 release commits and no other working tree changes before this checklist update.
Annotated tag v2.0.14 pushed to origin at ffc46ecbd2feaa8eccd670f9a533890280812365.
GitHub Actions run 27730559218 completed successfully in 3m10s; publish-macos-release passed build, jDeploy publish, canonical tarball upload, macOS branding repair, and GitHub release publish.

gh release view v2.0.14 reported published non-draft release at https://github.com/OpenARDF/SerialSlinger/releases/tag/v2.0.14 targeting ffc46ecbd2feaa8eccd670f9a533890280812365 with 2.0.14 desktop installer assets and serialslinger-2.0.14.tgz; tarball asset returned HTTP 200 after redirect.
npm run release:checklist -- --file docs/release-checklist-2.0.14.json --phase final passed after recording final publication evidence.
